commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get mpijob nccl-tests-efa -n efa-validation -o json 2>&1 | python3 -c "import sys,json; m=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(\"role=\",k,\"container=\",c.get(\"name\"),\"cmd=\",c.get(\"command\"),\"args=\",c.get(\"args\")) for k,v in m[\"spec\"][\"mpiReplicaSpecs\"].items() for c in v[\"template\"][\"spec\"][\"containers\"]]"'
